knownGaps: This is a reproducible 2026-04-07 Warcrier crawl snapshot, not a live July 2026 crawl; later site edits may not be present.
Fighter base sizes are not exposed by the parsed Warcrier cards and remain null.
Runemarks rendered only as icons were enriched from the Warcrier-linked warcry_data snapshot; no runemark was guessed for an unmatched item.
Ability rule prose is represented by concise non-verbatim summaries, structured keywords, numeric tokens, and a source-rule hash. Exact wording remains at the linked Warcrier section.
Narrative prose, complete core rules, battleplans, campaign tables, terrain diagrams, and other content outside the six target schemas were not forced into incompatible records.

The historical Warcry Releases page in this crawl lists releases through April 2024; later release metadata is represented by individual Warcrier source-page snapshots rather than inferred product dates.
